Standing up for Glasgow North

Martin Rhodes is the elected Member of Parliament for Glasgow North – covering Acre, Anderston, Cadder, Cleveden, Colston, Cowcaddens, Finnieston, Firhill, Garnethill, Gilshochill, Hamiltonhill, Hillhead, Kelvinbridge, Kelvindale, Kirklee, Lambhill, Maryhill, Milton, North Kelvin, Park, Parkhouse, Possilpark, Port Dundas, Ruchill, St. George’s Cross, Summerston, Woodlands, Woodside, Wyndford, Yorkhill and parts of City centre and Cowlairs

I’m committed to representing the people of Glasgow North, working hard to address your concerns and ensuring your voice is heard in Parliament.

Martin Rhodes MP

Contact Martin

Parliamentary protocol dictates that MPs can only deal with casework for residents within their constituency. Please include your full address in any correspondence.

Name(Required)
Address(Required)
Is you query related to pensions, tax or benefits?
Is you query related to Immigration?
DD slash MM slash YYYY
Would you like to sign up for our newsletter to get the latest on Martin’s work in Parliament and across the constituency?(Required)
By submitting this form I agree to the privacy policy(Required)

Local Surgeries

Martin holds regular advice surgeries across the constituency, please contact the office on 0141 321 3821 or at contact@martinrhodes.uk to arrange an appointment.
